titleStmt.title: SII 26.211: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 211. (A.R. No. 199 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Another slab set up near the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Vīra-Chikkarāya-uḍaiyār: Śaka 1430, Vibhava, Kārttigai 15 = 1508 A.D., November 13 (Monday).

summary.p: This inscription is much damaged in its middle and end parts.

The ruler is stated to be the son of Vīra-Nañjarāya-uḍaiyār. The inscription records a gift of 4 paṇam, being the monthly interest on the capital of 20 poṉ, made by a certain Ōduvanañjayan, son of Nañjaṇa-cheṭṭiyār, a merchant of Emmaṟakāl in Tiṉaikkaṇambai-nāḍu (Terkaṇāmbai-nāḍu), to provide for food offerings during a daily periodical worship instituted in the donor's name to the deity Avināśi-liṅgam in Dakshiṇa-Vārāṇasi. The amount of 20 poṉ was taken on loan by some persons who were enjoined to give the interest of 4 paṇam monthly to carry out the object of the endowment eternally.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastajagadātipatippaya
śrī kaiyilāca nivācapārva
(pa)tiprāṇanāta Ellā te
var vallapaṉ dekṣaṇa vaā
rāṇāci Aviṉāciliṅkaṉuk
ku śrī viranañcarāya Uṭaiya
r kumārarāṉa viracikkarāya U
ṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa cā
livākaṉa cakarayāṇṭu 1000 4 100 3 10
kku mel vipa varuṣam kātti
kai mātam 5§ tiṉaikka
ṇāṭapai nāṭṭu Emmaṟakā
lattu ceṭṭikaḷil nañca
ṇa ceṭṭiyār makaṉ Ōtu
vanañcaiyanavaru taṟumam cā
taṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapa
ṭiyāvatu Iṉṉāyanāṟku
nammiṭaperāl kaṭṭuppa
ṇṇi Avacaram ḥ1ḥ kku
naivettiyattukku nci paṭi
2ḥ paruppu paṭi ḥ(1/4)ḥ vaḻutalaṅ
kāy ḥ1ḥ ney colla
kai ḥ(1/4)ḥ viḷaiyattukku
pākku ḥ4ḥ veṟṟilai ḥ5ḥ
tīpam ḥ2ḥ Immaruvāti naṭa

ttumpaṭikku mātu ḥ1ḥ kku mā 1
Āka cāntanāyiṉār Avinācipaṇṭi
tar Āvuṭai Avināciappaṉ va
cam kaṭaṉāka kuṭutta ø2 10 Ip
poṉṉirupatukkum vaṭṭi nālu
paṇattile Immaruvāti nai
vettiyak kaṭṭaḷai tānikar ku
ṭaṅkoṇṭu koyil pu
kuntavaṉ cantirātittavarai na
ṭattivarakkaṭavārkaḷākavum I
nta taṉmattukku Akutam paṇ
ṇinavaṉ keṅkai karaiyi
l kurāmpacuvaik koṉṟapā
vattile povakkaṭavarākavu
mḥ Ippaṭikku tānikar nayiṉār
Aviṉāci paṇṭitar Āvuṭai Avi
nāci Appaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻu
ttuḥ Ippaṭikku Inta cātaṉam
Eḻutinamaikku kaṇakku Aḻai
ppiccār Eḻuttuḥ

tatumpaṭikku
Iṉṉāyiṉā
r tevatāṉamā
ṉa Ila
kuḷatanma
tal nām ko
ṇṭu kuṭutta The rest of the inscription containing 17 lines is fully damaged.
Digital edition of SII 26.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
